extensions.official.description: Default SemVer used when emitting a product endpoint descriptor without an explicit version override.
Deterministically ordered dist/bin wrapper names associated with a product endpoint descriptor.
Hash of the negotiated client endpoint descriptor.
Compatibility mode selected by deterministic endpoint negotiation.
Sorted contract categories that prevented a full compatibility match.
Endpoint descriptor or record explicitly allows read-only compatibility fallback.
Law profile bound when negotiation degrades to read-only compatibility.
Deterministic refusal payload captured on negotiation refusal or degrade decision.
Sorted required capability mismatches detected during negotiation.
Deterministically ordered enabled capability set chosen by endpoint negotiation.
Sorted endpoint descriptor hashes included in a proof-anchor surface.
Hash of the deterministic negotiation record for the active handshake or refusal.
Sorted negotiation record hashes included in a proof-anchor surface.
Deterministic source tag used by offline descriptor emission metadata and capability default provenance.
Hash of the negotiated server endpoint descriptor.
Deterministically ordered handshake transcript messages attached to a negotiated connection response.
Session-begin payload attached to a negotiated connection response for deterministic client bootstrap.
Explicit request for replayable nondeterministic allowances under mod policy governance.
Ordered substitute capability candidates for CAP-NEG degrade rules and fallback maps.
Alternative substitute capability candidates for CAP-NEG degrade rules and fallback maps.
Explicit substitute capability id chosen by a CAP-NEG degrade rule.
Explain-key identifier surfaced when a capability is degraded or disabled.
LawProfile override applied when CAP-NEG negotiation forces read-only mode.
